creator: Anthony Ha
title: (No AI) Elon Musk unveils chip manufacturing plans for SpaceX and Tesla

content: Elon Musk recently outlined ambitious plans for a chip-building collaboration Tesla and SpaceX — but he has a history of overpromising.

creator: Anthony Ha
title: (No AI) Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
dc:creator: Anthony Ha
content: An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of “falsely” convincing “hundreds of customers they were compliant” with privacy and security regulations.

title: (No AI) Musk says he’s building Terafab chip plant in Austin, Texas
author: Terrence O’Brien
content:
![Elon Musk looking confused over a bunch of question marks.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/02/STK171_VRG_Illo_15_Normand_ElonMusk_15.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Grok, how do you make chips? | Image: Laura Normand / The Verge

Elon Musk announced plans to build a [Terafab](https://www.theverge.com/transportation/816084/i-think-were-going-to-have-to-build-a-gigantic-chip-fab) plant in Austin, Texas, that will be jointly run by Tesla and SpaceX. The goal is to eventually build chips at scale for robotics, artificial intelligence, and [space-based data centers](https://www.theverge.com/tech/871641/spacex-fcc-1-million-solar-powered-data-centers-satellites-orbit) for Musk's various companies.

Musk has expressed concern, as have other executives, about the chip industry's ability to [keep up with demand](https://www.theverge.com/tech/880812/ramageddon-ram-shortage-memory-crisis-price-2026-phones-laptops) as the AI industry [has boomed](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/848988/nvidia-chip-loans-coreweave-gpu-debt-ai-neocloud). But building a chip fabrication plant is complex, requires billions of dollars, many years, and a ton of specialized equipment. And, as [_Bloomberg_](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-03-22/elon-musk-says-tesla-xai-spacex-terafab-to-start-in-austin) points out, Musk "has no background in semiconductor production and a history of over-promising on g …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/898722/musk-terafab-chip-plant)
contentSnippet:
Grok, how do you make chips? | Image: Laura Normand / The Verge	

Elon Musk announced plans to build a Terafab plant in Austin, Texas, that will be jointly run by Tesla and SpaceX. The goal is to eventually build chips at scale for robotics, artificial intelligence, and space-based data centers for Musk's various companies.
Musk has expressed concern, as have other executives, about the chip industry's ability to keep up with demand as the AI industry has boomed. But building a chip fabrication plant is complex, requires billions of dollars, many years, and a ton of specialized equipment. And, as Bloomberg points out, Musk "has no background in semiconductor production and a history of over-promising on g …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) AI was everywhere at gaming’s big developer conference — except the games
author: Jay Peters
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/55146110863_3ec9504855_o.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

AI was everywhere at the GDC Festival of Gaming this year. Vendors at the event pitched generative AI tools for things like making [AI-driven NPCs](https://www.artificial.agency/) and [even entire games from a chat box](https://tesana.ai/). On the show floor, I spent 10 minutes playing a demo of a pixel-art fantasy world generated by Tencent's AI tools. In a briefing with Razer, I watched an AI assistant for QA automatically log issues in a shooter game. And there were _many_ talks about AI, including [a standing-room only presentation](https://www.gamefile.news/p/google-deepmind-genie-3-gdc) by Google DeepMind researchers about playable AI-generated spaces.

But there was one key place where AI was missing: the games themselves. Of the many developers I s …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/games/897982/gdc-2026-ai-game-developer-conference)

But there was one key place where AI was missing: the games themselves. Of the many developers I s …

creator: Reece Rogers
title: (No AI) I Tried DoorDash’s Tasks App and Saw the Bleak Future of AI Gig Work
